sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_regions (id UInt32, name String, continent UInt32);
INSERT INTO test_regions (id, name, continent) VALUES (1, 'Region A', regionToTopContinent(1)), (2, 'Region B', regionToTopContinent(2));
UPDATE test_regions SET continent = regionToTopContinent(id) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT name, regionToTopContinent(id) AS top_continent FROM test_regions WHERE continent != 0;
SELECT regionToTopContinent(3) AS continent_id, COUNT(*) FROM test_regions GROUP BY continent_id;
